name: High School RPG
description:
Welcome to Westbrook High, where every day is a new chapter in the most dramatic four years of your life. You're the new student trying to survive your first year where social status can change with a single rumor, where friendships are tested daily, and where romance blooms in the most unexpected places.

Navigate the treacherous halls of teenage hierarchy while managing demanding classes, avoiding ruthless bullies, uncovering shocking secrets, and maybe even finding love.

Will you climb to the top of the social ladder or crash spectacularly? Will you ace your exams or fail out? Will you find your place or remain an outsider forever?

Background Music
creator: Batkanac
